topWPAPlays.description: Daniel Schneemann doubles (9) on a fly ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. Brayan Rocchio scores.
José Ramírez singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Daniel Schneemann scores.
Dillon Dingler doubles (10) on a fly ball to left fielder Angel Martínez. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd.
Dillon Dingler homers (9) on a fly ball to left center field.
Riley Greene strikes out swinging.
Iván Herrera homers (6) on a fly ball to left center field.
Marcell Ozuna singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder José Fermín. Spencer Horwitz scores. Konnor Griffin scores.
Brandon Lowe homers (13) on a fly ball to left field.
Konnor Griffin doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Spencer Horwitz to 3rd.
Marcell Ozuna singles on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Konnor Griffin to 3rd.
José Tena strikes out swinging.
Daylen Lile doubles (14) on a fly ball to center fielder A.J. Ewing.
Keibert Ruiz grounds out, second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos.
James Wood doubles (14) on a sharp line drive to center fielder A.J. Ewing. Keibert Ruiz to 3rd.
Bo Bichette singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jacob Young. MJ Melendez scores. Luis Torrens scores. Carson Benge to 2nd.
Michael Harris II homers (10) on a fly ball to center field. Ronald Acuña Jr. scores.
Kyle Stowers homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
Ronald Acuña Jr. singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Mike Yastrzemski scores. Ha-Seong Kim scores.
Owen Caissie homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field.
Mike Yastrzemski homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field.
George Springer homers (4) on a fly ball to left field.
Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. J.C. Escarra out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.
Daulton Varsho doubles (11) on a ground ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores.
J.C. Escarra walks.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. strikes out swinging.
Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Darell Hernaiz to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Jo Adell out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.
Jo Adell singles on a line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. Vaughn Grissom to 3rd.
Josh Lowe strikes out swinging.
Darell Hernaiz singles on a line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Zack Gelof scores.
Nolan Schanuel homers (4) on a fly ball to right field. Mike Trout scores.
Corbin Carroll singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Gabriel Moreno scores. Ketel Marte to 2nd.
Tyler Freeman hit by pitch. Troy Johnston scores. TJ Rumfield to 3rd. Willi Castro to 2nd.

Nolan Arenado reaches on a fielder's choice out, pitcher Seth Halvorsen to catcher Hunter Goodman to third baseman Kyle Karros to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Geraldo Perdomo out at home. Nolan Arenado to 2nd.
Ezequiel Tovar grounds out, third baseman Nolan Arenado to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.
Hunter Goodman pops out softly to catcher Gabriel Moreno in foul territory.
